metadata.name: Information Model Structure
metadata.description: Structure of information containers and lifecycle information models in the ISO 19650 draft.
metadata.author: ISO19650 Knowledge Maps

nodes.label: Information Container
nodes.description: Unit of information managed within the common data environment.

nodes.label: Information Model
nodes.description: Structured set of information containers supporting lifecycle decisions.

nodes.label: Project Information Model (PIM)
nodes.description: Information model used during project delivery.

nodes.label: Asset Information Model (AIM)
nodes.description: Information model used during asset operation.

nodes.label: Information Exchange
nodes.description: Exchange of verified information between stakeholders.

nodes.label: Lifecycle Decision
nodes.description: Decision made during the lifecycle of the asset.

evidence.quote: Information models are collections of information containers supporting lifecycle decisions.
Project information models are used during delivery phases.
Asset information models support operation and asset management.
Information produced during delivery contributes to the asset information model.
Information exchanges provide verified information containers.
Information models support decision-making during the lifecycle of assets.
